results.title: Capital Group Dividend Growers ETF $CGDG Shares Purchased by Founders Financial Securities LLC
results.description: Founders Financial Securities LLC boosted its stake in Capital Group Dividend Growers ETF (NYSEARCA:CGDG – Free Report) by 23.1% during the 4th quarter, according to its most recent Form 13F filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The institutional investor owned 143,578 shares of the company’s stock after acquiring an additional 26,901 shares during [...]
